The '''Calipsa Run''' was a minor [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], that because of very few debris in the area made travel on this route very fast. The route connected the [[Calipsa Province]] and the [[Mecetti Province]] with the [[Procopian Shipping Lane]] at the [[Estaph system/Legends|Estaph system]]. Some of the notable worlds on this route were [[Calipsa]] and [[Grella]], as well as the [[New Javis system/Legends|New Javis system]], [[Lorenz system/Legends|Lorenz system]] and [[Nella system/Legends|Nella system]].

The Calipsa Run was neglected by many bulk cargo shippers until [[House Cadriaan]] issued stiff tariffs against [[House Calipsa]].
